title: BRENTWOOD-DARLINGTON COMMUNITY CENTER - 211info
text: IMPACT NW BRENTWOOD-DARLINGTON COMMUNITY CENTER BRENTWOOD-DARLINGTON COMMUNITY CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A community center that houses Impact NW's Early Childhood Department and part of the Youth Department. Staff can refer community members to other Impact NW programs. Recreational offerings include tai chi classes, pinochle, and Bunco. Center is available for rental evenings, weekends, and some daytime hours. It has three conjoined classrooms and a kitchen. Accommodates groups up to 120 or can be divided into three individual classrooms. 7211 SE 62nd Avenue Portland, OR 97206 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 721-6777 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 721-6777 Main phone Main phone (503) 721-6777 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Russian, Ukrainian AREA SERVED: Primarily Southeast Portland (Multnomah County part of zip codes 97022, 97202, 97204, 97206, 97214, 97215, 97216, 97233, 97236, and 97266) SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Services: General Recreational Activities/Sports Neighborhood Multipurpose Centers Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - SUN YOUTH ADVOCACY PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALTHY FAMILIES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - INDEPENDENT LIVING PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENT CHILD DEVELOPMENT SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENT CHILD THERAPEUTIC SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SAFE AND TOGETHER INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SUN COMMUNITY SCHOOLS SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - EARLY CHILDHOOD FATHERING PROJECT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
